sheets_formatter:
def progress_bar(value, width, height):
    result = "["
    value = max(0, min(1, value))
    percent = str(int(value*100)) + "%"
    length = width - 2 - len(percent)
    progress = round(value*length)
    result += "#"*progress
    result += "."*(length-progress)
    result += "]"
    result += percent
    return result

return progress_bar
